/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libsum_srv_interface__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/sum_srv_interface/libsum_srv_interface__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/sum_srv_interface__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/sum_srv_interface/srv/_sum_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jinyicheng/auto_navigation/build/sum_srv_interface:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libsum_srv_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libsum_srv_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
